name: Tip of the Tinying Tongue
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>舌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>した</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>先</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>減</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>少</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect by declaring exactly 1 card name: Negate that effect, then you can add 1 declared card from your Deck to your hand. If this Set card you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 500 ATK.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect by declaring exactly 1 card name: Negate that effect, then you can add 1 declared card from your Deck to your hand. If this Set card you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 500 ATK.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
